headline: Quiet BNY and Northern Trust Reward Patient Investors
summary: Custodian bank stocks like BNY Mellon and Northern Trust offer steady income, durable advantages, and exposure to the financial system’s vital infrastructure.

headline: 3 S&P 500 Stocks with Questionable Fundamentals
summary: The S&P 500 (^GSPC) is home to the biggest and most well-known companies in the market, making it a go-to index for investors seeking stability. But not all large-cap stocks are created equal - some are struggling with slowing growth, declining margins, or increased competition.
